params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature in your graveyard, you may play it this turn
params.SpellDescription: You may cast target creature card in your graveyard this turn.

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature in your graveyard, you may play it this turn
remaining_params.SpellDescription: You may cast target creature card in your graveyard this turn.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a creature spell from your graveyard, it becomes a black Zombie Knight.

params.Description: If a Zombie Knight would be put into your graveyard from the battlefield, exile it instead.
